nasb.text: I will make Jerusalem a heap of ruins, A haunt of jackals; And I will make the cities of Judah a desolation, without inhabitant.”

esv.text: I will make Jerusalem a heap of ruins, a lair of jackals, and I will make the cities of Judah a desolation, without inhabitant.”

cnv.text: “我要使耶路撒冷變成亂堆， 成為野狗的巢穴； 我要使猶大的城市荒涼， 無人居住。”

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“我要使耶路撒冷沦为废墟， 成为豺狼出没之地； 我要使犹大的城邑荒凉， 不见人烟。”
